prompt: Estimate FM-29 and set its points.
note: Premise correction: FM-29 turned out to have a full spec in its page body (8 AC + 6 edge cases) — only its one-line description property is empty. The eval therefore tests (a) that the missing-AC guardrail CHECK runs, and (b) re-estimation behavior against the contradicting pre-set effort value (Small).
assertions: Checks the ticket body for acceptance criteria before estimating (reads the full ticket, not just the board listing / description property)
Produces SEPARATE Developer points and QA points, each with a stated effort-based reason
Handles the pre-existing effort value (Small) explicitly: either re-estimates with a recorded 'Re-estimated from X to Y — reason' justified by comparables, or confirms it — never silently overwrites
Sets the effort property using the board's observed scale value (Small / Medium / Large) via upsert-ticket-details.sh with --dry-run
Touches ONLY the effort property — no status/title/priority/description/body change in any dry-run payload
